description: User reviews the list of available inbound flights from Melbourne to Adelaide on the search results page.
frame_description: Flight search results page showing multiple flight options with prices.

description: User clicks the 'From $177' button for the 12:10pm Virgin Australia flight to select it.
The 'Select Returning Fare Type' modal appears, offering Lite, Choice, and Flex fare options.
User selects the 'Lite' fare option within the modal to proceed.
A loading overlay appears with the message 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' and a progress spinner.
frame_description: Dimmed screen with a central loading message and spinner.
